message:
fix(beads): reject flag-like titles to prevent garbage bead creation (gt-e0kx5)

LLM agents accidentally created beads with title "--help" when running
commands like `bd create --title --help` (pflag consumes --help as the
title value). This caused dispatch loops where polecats bounced the work.

- Add IsFlagLikeTitle() validation that catches single-word flag-like
  titles (e.g., "--help", "--json", "-v") while allowing multi-word
  titles that contain flags (e.g., "Fix --help handling")
- Guard Create(), CreateWithID(), and CreateEscalationBead() with the
  validation to prevent garbage beads at the Go API layer
- Guard createAutoConvoy() to prevent flag-like titles from propagating
  into convoy names
- Harden remaining "--title", value patterns to "--title="+value for
  explicit flag=value binding (bead.go moveBead, swarm.go)
- Close garbage beads gt-6phsk and gt-b2nnu

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -151,7 +151,7 @@ func runBeadMove(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
 	createArgs := []string{
 		"create",
 		"--prefix", targetPrefix,
-		"--title", source.Title,
+		"--title=" + source.Title,
 		"--type", source.Type,
 		"--priority", fmt.Sprintf("%d", source.Priority),
 		"--silent", // Only output the ID

@@ -243,7 +243,7 @@ func runSwarmCreate(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
 			"create",
 			"--type=epic",
 			"--mol-type=swarm",
-			"--title", swarmEpic,
+			"--title=" + swarmEpic,
 			"--silent",
 		}
 		createCmd := exec.Command("bd", createArgs...)
